step1.prompt: Please enter your registered email and we will send a verification code

step3.newPasswordPlaceholder: 8-20 chars, must contain letters and digits

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email format

success.codeSent: A verification code will be sent to your registered email, please check

modal.dict-value-placeholder: Enter dictionary key (letters/digits/underscores only, must start with a letter)
modal.calling-code-placeholder: e.g. +86, must start with + followed by 1-4 digits

validation.dict-value-pattern: Dictionary key must contain only letters, digits, or underscores, and start with a letter
validation.calling-code-pattern: Calling code must start with + followed by 1-4 digits (e.g. +86)

modal.title: Menu Configuration
modal.alert: Menu type determines field behavior: Directory maintains display structure only; Menu maintains routing and component; Button maintains permission key only.

alert.title: Notice
alert.desc: Click 'Edit' to modify role name, description and accessible modules. Roles with 0 users can be deleted.

confirm-delete.title: Confirm Delete
confirm-delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete this role? This action cannot be undone.

modal.name-placeholder: Enter role name, e.g.: Operations Staff
modal.modules-tip: Select modules this role can access. Click group name to select/deselect all in group.

user.title: Admin Users
user.no-data: No admin users found under current filter

confirm-disable.title: Confirm Disable
confirm-disable.content: Are you sure you want to disable this user? The user will not be able to sign in.

modal.note-add: Adding a user will generate a default password and write role and profile to the admin ledger.
modal.note-edit: In edit mode you can update profile, role and contact. Username is locked.
modal.username-help-create: Username cannot be changed after creation
modal.email-placeholder: Used for notifications and password reset
modal.init-password-help: User must change password on first login

validation.username-pattern: Only letters, digits, and underscores are allowed
validation.email-invalid: Please enter a valid email format

reset-pwd-modal.title: Reset Password
reset-pwd-modal.warning: After reset, the user's password will be restored to the system default. The user must change their password on next login.

banner.message: {count} interview questions are pending review. Please handle them promptly.

modal.willShareWith: Will be shared with applicants from

addModal.accountTip: Note: After creating the student, a student account will be automatically generated. The default password is Osg@2026. Students are advised to change their password after first login.
